cards.prompt: Turn this into a Magic: The Gathering style card. A fierce red ember drake bursting from a volcano, dynamic action pose, dramatic lighting, full card frame with title, type line, mana cost, art box, and text box. High detail fantasy illustration.

A Magic: The Gathering style blue card depicting a serene tidecaller mage summoning a wave, intricate robes, glowing runes, ornate card border, title bar, mana cost, rules text box. Painterly fantasy art.
